---
title: "Fig. 4 boxplots"
output:
  html_document:
    df_print: paged
---

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidyverse)  # includes ggplot2, readr, dplyr, etc.
  library(svglite)    # robust SVG device for ggsave()
})
```

# ---- File paths ----

```{r}
infile <- "BothCalderasFluxesIsotopes.csv"

# Save outputs to a subfolder for cleanliness
out_dir <- file.path(getwd(), "figures")
dir.create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

out_CH4_png <- file.path(out_dir, "CH4_Fluxes.png")
out_CH4_svg <- file.path(out_dir, "CH4_Fluxes.svg")
out_CO2_png <- file.path(out_dir, "CO2_Fluxes.png")
out_CO2_svg <- file.path(out_dir, "CO2_Fluxes.svg")

```

# ---- Read data ----

```{r}
dat <- read_csv(infile, 
    col_types = cols(Date_of_Measurement = col_date(format = "%m/%d/%Y")))

```

# ---- Validate required columns ----

```{r}
required_cols <- c("Caldera", "Site_Name", "Soil_Type", "log10FCH4", "log10FCO2")
missing_cols <- setdiff(required_cols, names(dat))
if (length(missing_cols) > 0) {
  stop("Missing required column(s): ", paste(missing_cols, collapse = ", "))
}
```

# ---- Clean / coerce types ----

```{r}
plot_dat <- dat %>%
  transmute(
    log10FCH4 = as.numeric(log10FCH4),
    log10FCO2  = as.numeric(log10FCO2),
    Caldera = as.factor(Caldera),
    Site_Name = as.factor(Site_Name),
    Soil_Type = as.factor(Soil_Type)
  ) %>%
  drop_na(log10FCH4, log10FCO2, Caldera, Site_Name, Soil_Type)
```

# ---- log10CH4 Flux BoxPlot ----

```{r}
x_lab <- ("Soil Type")
y_lab <- expression("log" [10]* " F CH" [4]* "")

# ---- Plot ----
p <- ggplot(plot_dat,
  aes(x = Soil_Type, y = log10FCH4, fill = Caldera, position = Caldera)) +
    geom_boxplot(na.rm = TRUE, alpha = 0.3) +
  labs(x = x_lab, y = y_lab) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2", na.translate = FALSE) +  # color-blind friendly
  theme_classic(base_size = 12)
print(p)
```

# ---- Export CH4 boxplots (PNG + SVG) ----

```{r}
# Choose dimensions suitable for papers/slides; tweak as needed.
ggsave(
  filename = out_CH4_png,
  plot = p,
  width = 7.0, height = 5.0, units = "in",
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

ggsave(
  filename = out_CH4_svg,
  plot = p,
  width = 7.0, height = 5.0, units = "in",
  bg = "white"
)

# ---- Print locations to console ----
message("Wrote PNG: ", out_CH4_png)
message("Wrote SVG: ", out_CH4_svg)
```

# ---- log10CO2 Flux BoxPlot ----

```{r}
y_lab <- expression("log" [10]* " F CO" [2]* "")

p <- ggplot(plot_dat,
  aes(x = Soil_Type, y = log10FCO2, fill = Caldera, position = Caldera)) +
    geom_boxplot(na.rm = TRUE, alpha = 0.3) +
  labs(x = x_lab, y = y_lab) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2", na.translate = FALSE) +  # color-blind friendly
  theme_classic(base_size = 12)
print(p)
```

# ---- Export CO2 boxplots (PNG + SVG) ----

```{r}
# Choose dimensions suitable for papers/slides; tweak as needed.
ggsave(
  filename = out_CO2_png,
  plot = p,
  width = 7.0, height = 5.0, units = "in",
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)

ggsave(
  filename = out_CO2_svg,
  plot = p,
  width = 7.0, height = 5.0, units = "in",
  bg = "white"
)

# ---- Print locations to console ----
message("Wrote PNG: ", out_CO2_png)
message("Wrote SVG: ", out_CO2_svg)
```
